basic_details.job_title: EMRS Lahunipara Guest Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for PGT and TGT Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Eklavya Model Residential Schools Lahunipara (EMRS Lahunipara)
basic_details.short_information: Eklavya Model Residential Schools Lahunipara (EMRS Lahunipara) Guest Teacher Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the EMRS Lahunipara Guest Teacher Recruitment 2026.

content_sections.heading: EMRS Lahunipara Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the EMRS Lahunipara Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download EMRS Lahunipara Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: EMRS Lahunipara Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: PGT History: As per RR of NESTS PGT Economics: As per RR of NESTS TGT English: As per RR of NESTS

content_sections.heading: EMRS Lahunipara Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: PGT History: Rs 35000/- Per Month PGT Economics: Rs 35000/- Per Month TGT English: Rs 33000/- Per Month

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for EMRS Lahunipara Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for EMRS Lahunipara Guest Teacher posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Guest Teacher posts at Eklavya Model Residential Schools Lahunipara is scheduled for 27 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Teacher post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Guest Teacher posts announced by Eklavya Model Residential Schools Lahunipara.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Guest Teacher positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Guest Teacher positions ranges from Rs. 33,000 to Rs. 35,000 per month, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in. Interested and eligible candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue.

faq.question: Q5. What are the eligibility criteria for the Guest Teacher posts?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria for the Guest Teacher posts are as per the NESTS Recruitment Rules. Specific qualifications for PGT History, PGT Economics, and TGT English are mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the EMRS Lahunipara Guest Teacher recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q8. Where is Eklavya Model Residential Schools Lahunipara located?
faq.answer: Eklavya Model Residential Schools Lahunipara is located in Lahunipara, Odisha.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Guest Teacher posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Teacher posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the Important Links section of this article, where a direct download link is usually provided.
